title: Non-compliant matching JSON: missing state of distillation on Straight Bourbon (motion-blur, level 6, tilt-right)

form_data.reason: Straight whiskies require a state of distillation on the label.

image_prompt: Photorealistic clear glass bottle with a vintage train-themed label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Iron Horse', 'Straight Bourbon Whiskey', '45% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Bottled by Iron Horse Distillers, Chicago, IL'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has moderate motion blur from camera shake. Camera orientation is tilt-right (15 degrees).
